title: Loader/validator read-path inconsistency: legacy plain-text loads silently at runtime, hard-fails strict validation
claim: graph-metadata-parser.ts accepts legacy key:value text (returns migrated:true) without error; generated-metadata-integrity.ts does raw JSON.parse and emits FILE_UNPARSEABLE
counterevidenceSought: grandfather flag carve-out for FILE_UNPARSEABLE -- NONE, flag applies uniformly (all-or-nothing)
upgradeTrigger: second unparseable file found OR runtime acts on stale derived fields of migrated metadata

title: create_graph_metadata_file early-return guard prevents self-heal of malformed legacy files
claim: create.sh:408-410 returns 0 when graph-metadata.json exists unconditionally; re-scaffold cannot replace a malformed legacy file
counterevidenceSought: current heredoc shape vs sibling 010 -- matches, current tool cannot emit plain-text format
alternativeExplanation: guard exists to preserve hand-edited manual.* blocks from clobbering; defect is missing invalid-file regen branch not the guard itself
upgradeTrigger: no operator command can repair malformed file without manual rm

title: Seeded Known Context arithmetic error: ~53min claim is actually ~4h53m
claim: strategy.md:92 states malformed file mtime is ~53min after siblings; actual is 4h53m10s (11:40:36 - 06:47:26 local +0200)
evidenceRefs: stat mtimes: spec/plan/tasks/impl-summary=06:47:26; graph-metadata.json=11:40:36; handover=06:50:17; description.json=07:32:33
counterevidenceSought: commit ts precedes/follows mtime -- mtime 11:40 precedes commit 16:35 by ~4h55m, consistent with written-then-committed
alternativeExplanation: typo 4h53m->53m rather than misread; gap wrong by ~4h regardless

hypothesis: Malformed graph-metadata.json is a systemic defect in the current create.sh / scaffolding tool
evidence: create.sh:452-479 current heredoc emits valid schema-conformant JSON
sibling 010 (same packet) is valid schema-conformant JSON
current create_graph_metadata_file cannot emit the 7-line plain-text format

hypothesis: grandfather mode selectively tolerates FILE_UNPARSEABLE while enforcing schema drift
evidence: generated-metadata-integrity.ts:253-281 applies grandfather boolean uniformly to all violation codes; no per-code carve-out

question: Exact producing mechanism of the plain-text file (older create.sh version / superseded template / different scaffolding entrypoint / agent hand-authoring) -- committed-as-is CONFIRMED, mechanism UNRESOLVED
resolveVia: git log -p -- create.sh to locate plain-text->JSON heredoc switch
search for historical restamp/migration script and any one-file exclusion
